title: Monsoon Wholesome Ethiopian Dash-Friendly Roast
description: A delicious roast dish inspired by the flavors of Ethiopia, featuring orange zest and a crispy exterior. This recipe is perfect for a quick and easy dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 220°C (425°F) and season the beef roast with salt, black pepper, and a pinch of berbere spice mix.
Heat the ghee or oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat and brown the roast on all sides.
Transfer the roast to a large Dutch oven or oven-safe pot and add the sliced onion, minced garlic, and grated ginger to the pot.
Add the potatoes, carrots, and green beans to the pot if using, and cover with a lid.
Roast the dish in the preheated oven for about 1 hour, or until the vegetables are tender and the roast is cooked to your liking.
Remove the pot from the oven and let it cool slightly before slicing the roast against the grain.
Strain the cooking juices and discard any excess fat, then serve the roast with the flavorful sauce spooned over the top.
Serve with injera bread or over rice, if desired.
